response.justification: The candidate has a very strong technical background with extensive hands-on experience in modern software development, open-source technologies, and system architecture. However, they fall critically short on two major requirements for this position: their German proficiency is only at a 'Basic' level (minimum C1 is required), and their background lacks the executive-level leadership, project management, and IT consulting experience expected of a Head of Development.
strengths: Extensive hands-on experience with modern software development, full-stack engineering, and open-source technologies.
Demonstrated architectural capability and initiative as the founder of an open-source Geo-Data platform.
Proven track record of mentoring, community building, and sharing knowledge through workshops, talks, and coding dojos.
concerns: German language proficiency is listed as 'Basic', which does not meet the strict minimum C1 requirement.
Lacks formal executive-level leadership and operational management experience required for a Head of Development role.
Missing explicit experience in formal IT consulting, UML modeling, and enterprise compliance/risk management.
